# Reaffirmation Agreements in Bankruptcy: Should You Sign?
> Should you sign a reaffirmation agreement? Understand the risks, benefits, and alternatives for keeping property in Chapter 7. Fr...

## About
reaffirmationagreement is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Reaffirmation Agreements in Bankruptcy: Should You Sign?: https://reaffirmationagreement/
- Reaffirming Your Car Loan in Chapter 7 Bankruptcy: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/car-reaffirmation.html
- Reaffirm Credit Card Debt in Bankruptcy? Almost Never.: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/credit-card.html
- Reaffirmation Agreements in Bankruptcy: Should You Sign?: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/
- Mortgage Reaffirmation: Do You Need to Reaffirm Your Home Loan?: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/mortgage-reaffirmation.html
- Mortgage Reaffirmation in Bankruptcy: Is It Required?: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/mortgage.html
- Changed Your Mind? How to Rescind a Reaffirmation Agreement: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/rescission.html
- The Risks of Reaffirmation: What Your Creditor Won't Tell You: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/risks.html
- When to Refuse a Reaffirmation Agreement: https://reaffirmationagreement.org/when-to-say-no.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
